raw_consumer_statement:
I am submitting this formal complaint with Citi Bank. I purchased a {$2600.00} ticket on XX/XX/year> for a XX/XX/year> flight on XXXX XXXX. I disputed a {$260.00} seat fee, and XXXX issued a refund for that fee. However, they cancelled my entire reservation in error. 

On XX/XX/year>, when I called XXXX to confirm my upcoming travel, I was informed that my reservation had been cancelled. I did not cancel my reservation and had every intention of traveling. XXXX cancelled the entire reservation because of the seat fee dispute. A XXXX representative advised me to request a chargeback with Citi. When I contacted Citi, I was told that a second dispute could not be opened because XXXX allows only one dispute per charge. I explained that the seat fee was minor compared to the full reservation being cancelled and that I am still owed {$2300.00}. 


Please see my attached letter for full details and documentation. Below is a summary : XXXX Reservation Code : XXXX XXXX Ticket No. : # XXXX Total amount charged : {$2600.00} ( paid by Citi credit card ) Partial chargeback received : {$260.00} for seat fees Balance still owed : {$2300.00} plus interest Issue : Entire reservation cancelled in error by XXXX XXXX ; I never traveled First contact with airline after cancelation : XX/XX/year> Current status : Repeated follow-ups with no refund issued Citi Credit card interest rate : 28.99 %, ongoing due to XXXX delay Consumer note : I am a XXXX XXXX and this was intended as a one-time international trip. I do not reside in XXXX XXXX flight path, and a voucher would be of no use to me. 

I respectfully request that the Department investigate this matter and compel Citi to refund the {$2300.00} balance and compensate me for interest accrued as a result of their inaction.
